MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RENTAL CAR FINANCE CORP'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Off calendar per moving party. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, per dismissal of entire action filed on March 19, 2009. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Continued To Apr-20-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2008 Continued To Mar-02-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-01-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Pltf'S Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf, Michael Bain And His Attorney Of Record, Edward Emith, Esq. Declaration Of Gene S. Stone
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Trenier Wright, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Rental Car Finance Corporation; appearing by telephone
Robert D. Resner, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Michael Bain

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted with modification. Defendant Rental Car Finance Corporation's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 10 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $490 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
MODIFICATION. that the motion is moot as to the special interrogatories as supplemental responses have been served. The parties shall meet and confer. Plaintiff shall serve verified responses without objections to the form interrogatories and pay sanctions per the tentative ruling. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Pltf'S Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set 1; For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf, Michael Bain And His Attorney Of Record, Edward Smith, Esq.; Memorandum Of P/A; And Declaration Of Gene S. Stone
Off Calendar Sep-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Telphonic Apperance: Gene S. Stone, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Rental Car Finance Corporation

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Rental Car Finance Corporation's motion to compel responses to request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $415 shall be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2008 Continued To Oct-17-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
